mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.dict_ctg, d.dict_type, d.description, d.sort, d.create_time, d.create_by, d.update_time, d.update_by, d.remark, d.version, COUNT(di.id) count FROM mdm_dict d LEFT JOIN mdm_dict_item di ON di.dict_type = d.dict_type and di.deleted = 0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND d.deleted = 0 AND d.dict_ctg = #{dictCtg} AND d.dict_type LIKE concat('%', #{dictType},'%') AND d.description LIKE concat('%', #{description},'%') GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.sort, d.id DESC
SELECT dict_type, description FROM mdm_dict WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT dict_ctg, dict_type, description, sort, remark FROM mdm_dict WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_ctg = #{dictCtg} AND dict_type = #{dictType}
AND dict_type IN ( #{item} )

SELECT * FROM mdm_dict WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_ctg = #{dictCtg} AND dict_type = #{dictType}
AND dict_type IN ( #{item} )

SELECT d.dict_type, d.description, COUNT(di.id) count FROM mdm_dict d LEFT JOIN mdm_dict_item di ON di.dict_type = d.dict_type AND di.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.sort, d.id
